---
title: "Lecture 22 Quiz: Revision & Mini Project (JavaScript & DOM)"
jupyter: julia-1.12
---

::: {.callout-note}
Review before quiz:
[Lectures](/lectures/lecture-22.qmd) | [Week 8 Content](/content/week-08.qmd) | [Lab 6](/labs/lab-06.qmd) | [Home Assignment 3](/assignment/03-assignment.qmd)
:::

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
using QuizQuestions
```

## Lecture 22 Self-Check

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. Database backup tool", "B. Single-page task tracker", "C. CSS animation engine", "D. Servlet deployment server"]
question = "Question 1: What mini project is proposed in this lecture?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. Add tasks", "B. Mark tasks complete", "C. Filter by status", "D. All of these"]
question = "Question 2: Which capabilities are part of the Smart Task Tracker brief?"
answer = 4
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `trim()`", "B. `sort()`", "C. `split()`", "D. `concat()`"]
question = "Question 3: Which string method is used before validating that task input is not empty?"
answer = 1
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `document.createElement('li')`", "B. `new listItem()`", "C. `taskList.make('li')`", "D. `appendChild('li')`"]
question = "Question 4: Which statement correctly creates a new list item element for rendering tasks?"
answer = 1
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. To block all keyboard input", "B. To display a validation message when the task input is empty", "C. To store tasks in the database", "D. To hide the task list permanently"]
question = "Question 5: What is the purpose of the `errorBox` element in the project example?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```
